**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the spatial and demographic extremum circuit breaker mechanism. In commercial registrations, this enterprise is prominently tagged under the broad category of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and claims 'electronic product production and processing' at the forefront of its business scope. However, the forensic probe immediately locks onto its underlying anti-common-sense extremum: an insured employee count of only 5. The subsequent spatial probe directly punctures its manufacturing facade: its registered address is located at '2nd Floor, Unit B, No. 300 Zhihui Road, Qilin Technology Innovation Park.' 'Qilin Technology Innovation Park' is a high-end, asset-light park in Nanjing specifically targeting software R&D, artificial intelligence, and headquarters economies. A typical office unit like '2nd Floor, Unit B' is fundamentally incapable of hosting 'electronic processing and production' operations, which require environmental approvals and heavy assembly lines. The probe further dissects the latter half of its business scope: 'audio equipment, stage lighting equipment and accessories... decorative materials sales,' 'value-added telecommunications services, software development.' The commercial landscape emerges clearly: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant, but a Micro AV & Stage Equipment Proxy and Weak Current System Integrator (Asset-Light AV & IT System Integrator) operating out of a tech park office building. The owner leads a small team (5 people in total) to contract stage lighting, audio engineering, or weak current decoration projects externally, without manufacturing any hardware themselves. The official high-end manufacturing tag has been 100% demoted and debunked.
